---
title: "Mini_Project_2"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(polite)
```

```{r}
robotstxt::paths_allowed("https://www.nhl.com/stats/skaters?reportType=season&seasonFrom=20232024&seasonTo=20252026&page=0&pageSize=50")

#Step One
nhl <- read_html("https://www.nhl.com/stats/skaters?reportType=season&seasonFrom=20232024&seasonTo=20252026&page=0&pageSize=50")

#Step Two
tables <- html_nodes(nhl, css = "table")
```
